name: Mexican Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds round steak, bite size pieces
2 cups water or 1 cup red wine and 1/2 cup water
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat, onion, and garlic in oil in a large saucepan.
2. Drain the contents of the saucepan.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (water or wine, chili sauce, paprika, chili powder, seasoned salt, soy sauce, mushrooms, and green chili salsa) to the meat and simmer, covered, for 1 hour or until the meat is tender.
4. When ready to serve, warm the meat mixture.
5. Stir together the sour cream and flour and add to the meat 5 to 10 minutes before serving.
6. Serve over noodles or rice.
Summary of processes:
- Cut up: round steak
- Chop: 1 cup onion
- Mince: 2 cloves garlic
- Freeze in: 6-cup freezer container
- Serve with: rice or noodles, tomatoes stuffed with guacamole, warm tortillas, corn on the cob
